projectDescription: A community playground and resource collection for the Flipper Zero multi-tool device, covering signal files, BadUSB scripts, GPIO pinouts, firmware options, applications, and more.
keyFeatures: Sub-GHz signal files for garages, doorbells, remote outlets, and more
Universal Infrared remote files (TV, AC, audio, projectors, fans)
NFC resources including Amiibo files and expanded Mifare Classic key dictionary
BadUSB DuckyScript payloads for Windows, macOS, and Linux
GPIO pinout guides for ESP32, ESP8266, NRF24, and other hardware modules
WiFi Dev Board setup guide with Marauder and ESP32 flasher instructions
Firmware options comparison (Official, Unleashed, Momentum, RogueMaster)
Flipper Application Packages (FAPs) for custom plugins
Custom graphics, animations, and music player files
Dolphin level and butthurt state management files
publicApiSurface: Sub-GHz .sub signal files (RAW format: positive=send µs, negative=pause µs)
Infrared .ir files (TV, AC, audio, projectors, fans universal remotes)
GPIO pinout mappings for ESP32, ESP8266, NRF24L01+, RPi Zero, sensors
Flipper Application Package (.fap) files for custom firmware
Dolphin state files (.dolphin.state.*) for XP level management
Marauder commands: scanap, sniffbeacon, sniffdeauth, sniffpmkid, stopscan, clearap, ssid, update, attack
Sub-GHz frequency bands: 300-348 MHz, 387-464 MHz, 779-928 MHz (CC1101)
